pr.title: Record: Mixed Quant Int6/FP16 + SmearGate + OrthoInit + MLP 3x + Sliding Window, val_bpb=1.1556

output.summary: Combined SmearGate bigram gating, orthogonal init/Muon optimizer, and int6 STE QAT with sliding-window eval on a 9-layer transformer.
techniques: SmearGate bigram gate mixing current and previous embeddings
Orthogonal init plus Muon optimizer with decoupled weight decay
Int6 STE quantization-aware training paired with stride-64 sliding-window evaluation
